title: Visual Snowy Leaves
description: Snowy leaves that work for you, everywhere (not required on servers).
body:
Snowy leaves that works for you, everywhere (especially servers).

Leaves will slowly fade into their snowy colors during snowfall comprable to the same feature found at [Minecraft: Bedrock Edition](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Bedrock_Edition). Timings ang transition conditions are fully configurable!

Soon for version `0.6.0` *(currently in Beta)*:
* **This mods modifies Minecraft core shaders.**    
This is to achieve smooth transition instead of the former reliance on the more demanding and clunky chunk rebuilds.
* **This mod will not work when Iris shaders is enabled.**    
A fallback render is being considered at the moment.    
See also: https://github.com/IrisShaders/Iris/blob/1.21.11/docs/development/compatibility/core-shaders.md

Compared to other snowy leaves mods, this one is fully client-side! You can join servers with no worries with things like registry mismatch and weird blocks that shouldn't be rendered there! Improvements through texture modifications allows leaves to reach true white at their fully frosted state instead of just gray leaves.

## Configuration

The Visual Snowy Leaves configuration can be accessed through three ways:
* with Fabric API installed, you can bind a key to open the config screen
* with ModMenu, the same config screen can be accessed through the mod menu instead
* in any case, the configuration can still be accessed at `<.minecraft>/config/visual-snowy-leaves.json`

![All the Minecraft trees during snowfall, with this mod, minus tha Dark Oak tree since I forgot.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ff2M7Ii7/images/c8054426e672534eae0f8f86c20368229c823efd.png)
